goal: Install transformers/torch/Flask system-wide and download distilbert-base-uncased-finetuned-sst-2-english into /app/model_cache/sentiment_model.
summary: Phase 1 installed transformers/torch/flask system-wide and downloaded distilbert-base-uncased-finetuned-sst-2-english to /app/model_cache/sentiment_model. Both steps verified by real imports and on-disk file existence.
stepSummaries:
1. Install transformers, torch, and Flask via pip. [verified]
  2. Download distilbert-base-uncased-finetuned-sst-2-english and save it to /app/model_cache/sentiment_model using snapshot_download or pipeline(...). [verified]
reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Both steps used real verification: package import (smoke) and file-existence (proxy). The file-existence check on a 256MB safetensors file is a strong signal the artifact is genuinely present and not a stub.
gateVerdicts.evidence: Step 1: python3 import prints versions; Step 2: test -f config.json && (test -f pytorch_model.bin -o -f model.safetensors) exit 0.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Phase goal (install + download) is fully met: package versions print and model files are on disk at the documented path.
gateVerdicts.evidence: /app/model_cache/sentiment_model contains config.json, model.safetensors, pytorch_model.bin, tokenizer files.

gateVerdicts.rationale: No deferred items. All planned work in Phase 1 completed.
